meaning: n.情况,状态,困境,盟誓(婚姻)vt.保证,约定
examples: We were deeply moved by her plight.
She was touched by the plight of the refugees.
They bore their plight with stoicism and fortitude.
Which is why I decided to learn more about their plight and our nation's legal and social response.
And in none of those cases did the plight of workers improve one iota afterward.
